transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist I found is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Renata. I see you're on the Bluecrest Silver PPO plan. What's the name of the provider or clinic?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's called Fairview Physical Therapy, over on Grant Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me look that up... Yes, Fairview Physical Therapy is in-network with your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Will I still owe a copay for visits?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan has a twenty-five dollar copay per visit for physical therapy, up to twenty visits a year.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Renata. Is there anything else I can check for you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all I needed. Thanks so much.
